message:
chore(beads): close all remaining beads — full backlog clearance

Verified implementations across the entire NTM codebase and closed
49 beads (leaf tasks + epics) covering:

- Feature closures: Ensemble Comparison, Token Budget Advisor,
  Findings Deduplication, Synthesis Streaming, Dashboard Ensemble Panel,
  Privacy Mode, Encryption-at-rest, SLB Safety Gates, CM Memory Rules,
  CAAM Account Management
- Integration closures: rano, RCH, TOON, rust_proxy, xf, process_triage
- Test closures: serve coverage (81.3%), E2E swarm lifecycle,
  AutoRespawner, robot status enrichments, webhooks, orchestration,
  Local LLM, spawn throttling, agent activity timeline
- Epic closures: REST API v1, WebSocket, Command Kernel, Security/Auth,
  Web Platform, Flywheel Tool Bridges, Swarm Orchestration, all test
  coverage sub-epics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
